description: Flat list of AI art prompts derived from Dream Physics, for quick programmatic access

prompts.prompt: dreamscape with unstable shifting text, letters rearranging on signs and pages, surreal typography, soft unfocused edges, dream logic
blurry unstable vision dream scene, soft focus, fluid reality, shapes refusing to stay consistent, impressionistic
heavy slow motion running through dark hallway, limbs like lead, surreal nightmare atmosphere, muted colors
silent scream in a dream, mouth open but no sound, expressionistic horror, distorted face, oil painting
clock face melting and shifting, time changing at every glance, surreal timepiece, Dali-inspired
hyper-vivid dream scene more real than waking life, neon saturation, crystal clarity, luminous details
non-euclidean dream architecture, impossible staircase, rooms that shouldn't fit together, MC Escher style
infinite interior space, endless corridors of doors, impossible labyrinth inside a small room
gravity inverting in dreamscape, objects and people floating upward, sky and ground reversed
portal door in ordinary house opening to alien impossible landscape, threshold between worlds
dream architecture defying physics, floating staircases, walls that curve into sky, recursive rooms
time loop visualization in dream, same scene repeating with slight variations, ghostly overlapping figures
simultaneous timelines in dreamscape, past present future colliding, translucent layered realities
character aging decades in seconds within dream, rapid time lapse in single scene
dream self watching own body from above, out-of-body perspective, dual consciousness visualization
identity shifting in dream, person morphing into multiple selves simultaneously, fluid identity
composite dream character, two familiar faces merged into one entity, uncanny familiarity
shadow self in dream, confronting dark mirror version of oneself, Jungian symbolism
terror stretching dream landscape into infinite pursuit corridor, emotional geography made physical
love bending dreamscape toward reunion, warm light pulling scenes together, romantic surrealism
confusion fragmenting dream space into disconnected floating rooms, scattered reality
ecstasy melting all dream boundaries into pure color and light, transcendent dissolution
Jungian dream symbols floating in dark water, archetypes as luminous shapes, collective unconscious
oneiros — raw perceptual matter of dreams, flowing luminous substance forming reality
lucid dream clarity, self-awareness within dream, crystal clear surreal landscape, heightened presence
sleep paralysis hallucination, dark figure in peripheral vision, crushing weight, paralyzed in dream
false awakening dream, waking up inside a dream inside a dream, nested realities
hypnagogic state visualization, falling asleep threshold, geometric phosphene patterns
oneiros — the raw perceptual substance of dreams, luminous flowing matter that IS space
affective field visualization, emotion curving dream spacetime like gravity curves space
mnemonic gravity — heavy memories distorting dream toward familiar narratives
memory well visualization, unresolved emotion as black hole pulling dreams into orbit
the wise guide in dream, ancient figure with calm eyes, knows all dream laws, otherworldly serenity
the shadow self, dark mirror of dreamer, identical but twisted, confronting your own darkness
sleep paralysis entity, dark formless presence in peripheral vision, ancient terror, shadow being
dream composite character, features of multiple people merged impossibly, uncanny hybrid face
